title: File:The Dave Clark Five with Ed Sullivan.JPG
creator: Epic Records-Stamp is not entirely clear, but says "Epic Records Photo-Please Credit".
credit: eBay item photo front photo back
description: Photo of The Dave Clark Five with Ed Sullivan from an appearance on Sullivan's show. From left: Mike Smith, Denny Payton, Ed Sullivan, Dave Clark, Lenny Davidson, Rick Huxley.
date: There is an extremely faint 1964 date stamp on back-this may be a photo of the group's first Sullivan Show appearance in February 1964.
